anti_claim: The Engine Room demo validates bounded public capsule composition only. It does not export private macro run state, credentials, provider/browser state, raw operator threads, third-party clones, release approval, publication authority, or private-root equivalence.

allowed_public_inputs: public capsule ids and target ids
public fixture case ids and stable error codes

standard_payload.anti_purpose: A green receipt that hides missing capsule surfaces, omits the negative target-missing case, treats staged exercises as production readiness, or implies private-root equivalence.
failure_modes: expected jewel target inventory drifts from the 14 Engine Room targets
one or more staged capsule source, fixture, manifest, paper, standard, or test surfaces goes missing
positive controller audit passes without running the staged capsule exercise chain
negative missing-target fixture stops producing ENGINE_ROOM_EXPECTED_TARGET_MISSING
composition organ is absent from registry, acceptance, or atlas shared surfaces
receipt claims production readiness, release authority, frontier theorem-proving, complete security proof, provider dispatch, or private-root equivalence
receipt exports private macro run state, credentials, provider/browser state, raw operator threads, or copied body text
standard_payload.ontology: A public-safe accepted composition organ that folds the staged Engine Room capsule audit into one runnable Microcosm surface with positive and negative fixture cases.
standard_payload.teleology: Let a cold reader run one command that proves the 14 Engine Room jewel targets are present, public-safe, fixture-exercised, shared-surface integrated, and bounded by explicit anti-claims.

contract_projection_basis.authority_boundary: computed standard-lattice contract only; existing authority_ceiling remains the operative claim ceiling.

validation_rules: require exactly 14 covered Engine Room jewel targets
execute the staged Engine Room capsule demo over public fixtures
verify every staged capsule owns its module, fixture manifest, standard, paper module, fixture input, and test surface
keep production_ready, private_root_equivalence, frontier_theorem_prover, complete_security_proof, provider_dispatch, publication_authorized, release_authorized, and source_mutation_authorized false
receipts may expose refs, counts, target ids, case ids, and omission-safe summaries but not private macro run state or copied body text

author.purpose: create a valid Engine Room demo instance

refine_instance.purpose: improve an existing Engine Room demo without corrupting authority

refine_standard_and_propagate.purpose: change std_microcosm_engine_room_demo and propagate through governed artifacts plus generated lattice projections

source_authority_ref: microcosm-substrate/AXIOMS.md#1 (JSON is contract; Markdown is projection)

doctrine_kind_envelope.note: This standard conforms to the universal doctrine-kind envelope; markdown, Mermaid, Atlas, coverage, health, and entry-card views are generated projections of this JSON source.

anti_claims: The Engine Room demo validates bounded public capsule composition only. It does not export private macro run state, credentials, provider/browser state, raw operator threads, third-party clones, release approval, publication authority, or private-root equivalence.

Active v2 standard status is a source JSON contract state only; it does not expand release, publication, provider dispatch, private-root equivalence, or whole-system correctness authority beyond the authority_ceiling.

runtime_acceptance_refs.uplift_basis: registry accepted_public_runtime_standard plus standard-local validator_contract, receipt_contract, source_refs, authority_ceiling, public_private_boundary, and anti-claim floor.
